creator: john@essenz.com
text:
We are a hosted PBX VOIP provider, our entire platform is run on FreeBSD with Asterisk. Below is a short paragraph that can be added to the Vendors -> ISP page listing

Essenz
Essenz is a leading business VOIP provider based in Pennsylvania serving the entire Mid-Atlantic region. We offer a truly managed phone solution that does not require any customer premise equipment, all you need is a broadband connection. Everything from our website to our Hosted PBX calling platform is fully powered by FreeBSD 8. Thanks John Von Essen
